buildCommand: npx vite build && npx esbuild api/_build.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=api/index.js --alias:@shared/db=./shared/db --alias:@shared/db/client=./shared/db/client --alias:@shared/db/schema=./shared/db/schema --alias:@shared/db/schema/analysis_jobs=./shared/db/schema/analysis_jobs --alias:@shared/db/schema/annotations=./shared/db/schema/annotations --alias:@shared/db/schema/film_sessions=./shared/db/schema/film_sessions --alias:@shared/db/schema/guardians=./shared/db/schema/guardians --alias:@shared/db/schema/messages=./shared/db/schema/messages --alias:@shared/db/schema/players=./shared/db/schema/players
